Info

Defines ats_utilities.config_io.xml package.

class ats_utilities.config_io.xml.Object2Xml(config_file: str | None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IWrite

Defines class Object2Xml with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for writing a configuration to a XML file. Conversion of Python object to XML content.

It defines:

attributes:
_EXT - File extension of the configuration file.
_verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
_file_path - Configuration file path.
methods:
__init__ - Initials Object2Xml constructor.
write_configuration - Writes configuration to a XML file.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

__EXT: str = 'xml'¶
__MODE: str = 'w'¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
write_configuration(config: BeautifulSoup | None, verbose: bool = False) → bool[source]¶

Writes configuration to a XML file.

Parameters:

  • config – Configuration object

  • verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Type:

<Optional[BeautifulSoup]>

Returns:

True (configuration written to file) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exception:

ATSTypeError | ATSValueError

class ats_utilities.config_io.xml.Xml2Object(config_file: str | None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: IRead

Defines class Xml2Object with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for reading a configuration from a XML file. Conversion of XML content to Python object.

It defines:

attributes:
_EXT - File extension of the configuration file.
_verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
_file_path - Configuration file path.
methods:
__init__ - Initials Xml2Object constructor.
read_configuration - Reads a configuration from an XML file.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

__EXT: str = 'xml'¶
__MODE: str = 'r'¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
read_configuration(verbose: bool = False) → BeautifulSoup | None[source]¶

Reads a configuration from an XML file.

Parameters:

verbose (<bool>) – Enable/Disable verbose option

Returns:

Configuration object | None

Return type:

<Optional[BeautifulSoup]>

Exceptions:

None

class ats_utilities.config_io.xml.XmlBase(info_file: str | None = None, xml2obj: IRead | None = None, obj2xml: IWrite | None = None, options_parser: ATSOptionParser | None = None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, strategy: IATSArgParseStrategy | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: object

Defines class XmlBase with attribute(s) and method(s). Loads the ATS configuration for the ATS. XML configuration-based API support.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker mapping.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for check operations.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__file_checker - FileCheck for checking file.
__json2obj - In API for information.
__obj2json - Out API for information.
__tool_operational - Control ATS operational functionality.
__option_parser - Option parser for ATS.
methods:
__init__ - Initials IniBase constructor.
is_tool_ok - Checks is tool operational.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

is_tool_ok() → bool[source]¶

Checks is tool operational.

Returns:

True (tool is operational) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

property option_parser: ATSOptionParser¶

Option parser for ATS.

Returns:

Option parser for ATS

Return type:

<ATSO

ptionParser> :exceptions: None
